channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Gaming Laptop (2026): What You Need to Know
item.description: With over a decade of experience in reviewing gaming laptops, here’s my rundown of what to consider before pulling the trigger.

item.title: Best Alternatives to Google’s Android Operating System (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Whether you have privacy concerns or you just want to freely tinker, these are our favorite alternatives to stock Android.

item.title: Indian pharmacy chain giant exposed customer data and internal systems
item.description: A backend flaw in web admin dashboards used by one of India's largest pharmacy chains, exposed thousands of online pharmacy orders.

item.title: Ring Kills Flock Safety Deal After Super Bowl Ad Uproar
item.description: Plus: Meta plans to add face recognition to its smart glasses, Jared Kushner named as part of whistleblower’s mysterious national security complaint, ...

item.title: Here’s What It’s Like to Use H&R Block’s DIY Tax Service (2026)
item.description: Filing taxes is a pain. Here’s how H&R Block DIY performed against other services I tested.

item.title: Nothing opens its first retail store in India
item.description: The two-story location will sell products from Nothing and the more affordable, mass-market brand CMF.

item.title: Airbnb plans to bake in AI features for search, discovery and support
item.description: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky said the company wants to increase its use of large language models for customer discovery, support and engineering.

item.title: Best Apple Watch (2026): Series 11, SE 3, and Ultra 3
item.description: Should you splurge on the new Series 11, or will the SE 3 do? Let us help you figure out which version to get (and which to avoid).

item.title: Fintech lending giant Figure confirms data breach
item.description: The company said hackers downloaded “a limited number of files” after breaking into an employee’s account. The hacking group ShinyHunters took respons...

item.title: Airbnb says a third of its customer support is now handled by AI in the US and Canada
item.description: Airbnb was poised to introduce an app that doesn't just search for you, but one that "knows you." CEO Brian Chesky said, "It will help guests plan the...
